name: Intel Core i9 14900K 14th Gen Processor
description: Intel Core i9 14900K 14th Gen Processor What is Intel Core i9 14900K 14th Gen Processor price in Pakistan? Intel Core i9 14900K 14th Gen Processor price in Pakistan is Rs.149,000. This flagship CPU offers 24 cores (8 Performance + 16 Efficient) and 32 threads with boost clocks up to 6.0 GHz, delivering exceptional performance for gaming and content creation. Built on the LGA 1700 socket with support for DDR5 memory and PCIe 5.0, it provides cutting-edge speed and future-ready compatibility. Buy
